about.name: Muhammad Adam Afiq
bio: I'm Adam Afiq, a Software Engineer focused on building practical systems that solve real business problems. I specialize in dashboards and monitoring applications that give teams instant visibility into their data, internal tools that automate workflows, and web applications built for reliability and usability.

My approach is straightforward: understand the problem deeply, build a clean solution, and deliver something that actually gets used. I care about performance, maintainability, and making complex systems feel simple.

services.title: Dashboard Development
services.desc: Custom analytics dashboards that turn raw data into clear, interactive visualizations — built to be fast, intuitive, and always up to date.

services.title: Monitoring Systems
services.desc: Real-time monitoring solutions that track system health, network performance, and IoT sensors — with alerts when things need attention.

services.title: Internal Tools
services.desc: Purpose-built web applications that streamline your team's workflows — inventory systems, approval flows, staff portals, and more.

services.title: Reporting Systems
services.desc: Automated reporting platforms that generate and distribute scheduled reports — PDF exports, Excel summaries, and email delivery built in.

services.title: Web Applications
services.desc: Robust, user-friendly web applications built for reliability and performance — from simple CRUD tools to multi-user systems with role-based access.

services.title: Automation Solutions
services.desc: Smart automation systems that eliminate repetitive tasks such as data collection scripts, scheduled jobs, notification bots, and workflow integrations.

experience.desc: Develop custom AI vision solutions for clients and internal systems, delivering end-to-end projects from requirements gathering and solution design to deployment and ongoing support. Also create AI hardware demonstration projects for marketing, sales, and product showcase purposes.

Developing custom monitoring dashboards, internal business tools, and web applications for clients across various industries. Delivering end-to-end solutions from requirements gathering through deployment and ongoing support.

Designed and developed 6 web-based systems and dashboards during the internship, utilizing Flask, Google BigQuery, and Google Apps Script to streamline data management, reporting, and operational workflows.
